🛡️ v1.0.0 "Aegis"

Privacy-First CAPTCHA Verification

Secure your website without compromising user privacy. Zero tracking, zero fingerprinting, zero cookies. Just pure cryptographic security.

Try Live Demo Learn More

Why Choose VaultGuard™?

Built from the ground up with privacy and security as core principles

Zero Tracking

We don't track, fingerprint, or profile users. No cookies, no analytics, no data collection. Your users' privacy is sacred.

Cryptographic Security

SHA-256 hashing with unique salts for every challenge. Time-limited tokens prevent replay attacks.

Time-Limited Challenges

Challenges automatically expire after configurable time periods. Default 5 minutes keeps your site secure.

GDPR Compliant

Zero data collection means simplified GDPR compliance. No consent banners needed for our CAPTCHA.

No Dependencies

Completely self-contained in a single file. No external libraries, no CDN requests, no bloat.

Easy Integration

Drop-in solution with beautiful UI. Works in any modern browser with a single script tag.

Security & Protection

Built-in protections against common web attacks and automated abuse

Anti-Bot Detection

Behavioral analysis tracks mouse movements, keystroke dynamics, and timing patterns to distinguish humans from automated scripts. Honeypot fields catch bots that fill invisible inputs.

XSS Protection

Input sanitization encodes HTML entities, neutralizes javascript: URIs, and strips event handler patterns. Content Security Policy meta tags restrict resource loading to trusted sources.

CSRF Protection

Cryptographically random tokens bound to each session with constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks. Tokens expire after 1 hour and are validated on every submission.

Clickjacking Protection

Frame-busting JavaScript prevents the page from being loaded in iframes. MutationObserver monitors for injected untrusted iframe elements and removes them automatically.

Session Hijack Protection

Browser fingerprinting via canvas and navigator properties binds each challenge to the browser session. Stolen tokens are useless from a different browser or device.

Tabnapping Protection

Clears window.opener references, sets strict referrer policy, and wraps window.open to add noopener/noreferrer to external links. Prevents reverse tabnapping attacks.

Rogue Extension Detection

Scans for suspicious DOM modifications, injected scripts from unknown sources, and unexpected global variables commonly injected by malicious browser extensions.

Security Headers

Generates recommended HTTP headers including X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Strict-Transport-Security, and Permissions-Policy. CSP meta tag injection included.

Image Puzzle Challenges

Select all images that match the category. Our puzzles are designed to be accessible and privacy-friendly.

Click on all images containing cars

See It In Action

Try the VaultGuard™ CAPTCHA demo below. Solve the challenge to see how smooth and privacy-friendly verification can be.

  • No cookies set
  • No data collected
  • No external requests
  • 100% client-side

Simple Integration

Get started in seconds with just a few lines of code

index.html 
<!-- Include VaultGuard CAPTCHA -->
<script src="captcha.js"></script>

<div id="captcha-container"></div>

<script>
  // Initialize with security features
  VaultGuard.quickSetup('captcha-container', {
    captcha: {
      expiryTime: 300000,
      maxAttempts: 3,
      enableBotDetection: true,
      enableCSRF: true,
      enableFingerprintBinding: true,
      enableHoneypot: true
    },
    security: {
      enableBehavioralTracking: true,
      enableFrameBusting: true,
      enableTabnappingProtection: true,
      enableExtensionDetection: true,
      enableCSP: true
    },
    callbacks: {
      onSuccess: (result, id) => {
        console.log('Verified!', result);
      },
      onError: (result, id) => {
        console.log('Failed:', result.error);
      }
    }
  });
</script>

0

Cookies Used

0

External Requests

0

Data Collected

1

File to Include
